name: application-intent-model
description: Eliminates AI hallucinations and logic drift by grounding code generation in versioned .aim files. AIM v4 treats each .aim file as a projection of a node-and-edge graph: typed edges — [verb](aim:#Facet:Name) — connect Views, Contracts, Flows, Schemas, and Events, and optional bindings map intent to code so review becomes a graph-diff. Three roles: Architect, Developer, Reviewer. Any agent self-bootstraps from the spec: URL declared in AGENTS.md.
